backend.changelog: Large-assembly Generate: the post-engage SolidWorks readiness recheck retries instead of aborting while SW is busy, and a blocked run no longer falsely shows Done.

cadBridge.changelog: 3D PDF generation now survives a transient SolidWorks COM disconnect on large assemblies: it re-acquires the connection and continues instead of stopping, so a brief RPC drop no longer aborts the remaining 3D PDFs.
